km.England: ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Mrs. Henry Berry於1158年出生在英國。她於1146年與Henry Berry Senior在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mrs. Henry Berry于1158年出生在英国。她于1146年与Henry Berry Senior在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世在她的家乡，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Berry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Béara ‘descendant of Béara’, a personal name of unexplained etymology; or, in some cases, perhaps an Anglicized form of Irish and Manx Ó Beargha. Compare Barry 1.
Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Barrie  .
English: habitational name from any of several places called in Devon named with Old English byrig, dative case of burh ‘fortified manor house, stronghold’, such as Berry Pomeroy and Berrynarbor.

variants.name: Barry
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Aidan, Ciaran, Eoin, John Patrick, Kaitlin, Kieran, Murphy, Aileen, Brigid, Caitlin.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beargha ‘descendant of Beargh’, a byname meaning ‘plunderer’.

Irish and Manx: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Báire ‘descendant of Báire’, a short form of either of two Gaelic personal names, Bairrfhionn or Fionnbharr, both meaning ‘fair-topped’. This may also be the source of the Manx name Barry, whose family's main seat was Ballavarry in Kirk Andreas.

variants.name: Bery
meanings: Hungarian (Béry): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Bér, in Baranya, Komárom, Nógrád, Pest, Vas, or Zala counties.

variants.name: Beery
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Ó Béara. See Berry and O'Berry .
Americanized form of Swiss German   Bieri  .

variants.name: Berrie
meanings: (Glasgow): from Middle English or Older Scots (atte) beri ‘(at the) manor house’, see Berry .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs. Henry Berry was born in 1158, in England. She married Henry Berry Senior in 1146, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in her hometown, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs. Henry Berry est née en 1158, à Angleterre. Elle a épousé Henry Berry Senior en 1146, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs. Henry Berry wurde 1158 in England geboren. Sie hat 1146 in England Henry Berry Senior geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs. Henry Berry è nata il nel 1158 nel England. Lei sposato Henry Berry Senior nel 1146, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs. Henry Berryは1158年にイギリスで生まれた。1146年にイギリスでHenry Berry Seniorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は故郷で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs. Henry Berry(은)는 1158년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1146년 영국에서 Henry Berry Senior(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mrs. Henry Berry nasceu em 1158, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Henry Berry Senior em 1146, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs. Henry Berry родилась в 1158 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Berry Senior в 1146 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Mrs. Henry Berry nació en 1158, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Henry Berry Senior en 1146, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
